conta.title: My Account
conta.notificacoes_desc: Get a daily notification when your ritual is ready. You can disable it at any time.

step1.title: Welcome to Akasha OS
step1.description: Your integrated spiritual self-knowledge system. Explore the four pillars: Kabbalah, Astrology, Ifá, and Tantra.

step2.title: Set Up Your Ritual
step2.description: Choose time and components for your personalized daily ritual.

step3.title: Track Your Progress
step3.description: View statistics, streaks, and history on your personal Dashboard.

step4.title: Begin Your Journey
step4.description: Do your first recommended practice based on your personal code.

odu.quizilas: Quizilás — practices that weaken your connection

evolution.title: Evolutionary Patterns
evolution.emptyHint: Keep practicing so the Evolutionary Agent can detect your patterns over time. Each day of practice enriches your history.

patterns.noDataRituals: Rituals will appear as history grows

mandato.leiaEmVozAlta: Read aloud. Notice what resonates most.
mandato.tresFrasesDesc: Three phrases that condense the energetic message of your chart for today.
mandato.roleParaBaixo: Scroll down for the next section ↓
mandato.respire: Breathe. Let the answer emerge before seeking words.
mandato.textareaPlaceholder: What's the first answer that comes, before the mind judges?
mandato.naoJulgue: What's the first answer that comes, before the mind judges?
mandato.salvoLocal: Saved only in your browser — no server submission.
mandato.suaSemente: Your seed of the day — intention derived from your chart
mandato.cvvReconhece: The Akasha Mentor recognizes signs of emotional distress in your intention and, by ethical design, steps back. Talk now with someone trained to listen, for free and 24h:
mandato.cvvNome: CVV — Centro de Valorização da Vida
mandato.indisponivelDesc: We couldn't calculate today's Mandate ({status}). Please try again in a moment.

errorBoundary.mensagem: We couldn't load your energetic Diary. Please try again in a moment.

ritual.explicaContaCantiga: Cabalistic Numerology works with numbers as resonance codes. This ritual activates the vibration of your base number in the context of the day.
ritual.explicaRespiracao: Astrology asks you to align with the celestial rhythm. Breathing with the Moon and the sign dissolves mental resistance.
ritual.explicaVarredura: Tantric Numerology holds that each subtle body carries memories. Passing 11 breaths through each one mobilizes dormant energy.
ritual.explicaOracao: The Birth Odu is your oral signature. Thanking the Ori before acting establishes presence and discernment.
ritual.explicaIching: The I Ching reveals ongoing mutations. Writing 1 word per mutable line anchors perception before the mind interprets.

significado.instrucao: Read each Pillar in order. Note the Shadow first (what you tend to refuse), then the Practice (the antidote). At the end, see how they connect.

areas.leiaInstrucao: Read from left to right — from professional to intimate.

tratamento.title: Integrated Treatment
tratamento.subtitle: Synthesis in 7 layers + chain of thought
tratamento.noAuth: You must be authenticated to access treatment.
tratamento.cadeiaDescription: Step-by-step reasoning the engine used to reach these conclusions.
tratamento.requires_professional_review: This section may benefit from professional accompaniment.

statePicker.heading: How are you today?
statePicker.subtitle: The page adapts to what you need right now. Choose once — we'll ask again only after 24h.

curioso.label: Curious
curioso.ariaLabel: I am curious — want to explore

centrado.fallback: Your map is silent today — that is also an answer. Enjoy the space.

ansioso.phraseFallback: You don't need to solve anything right now. Just breathe.
ansioso.mentorTitle: Open a conversation about what I feel now

breathOrb.idleHelpText: When you're ready, tap to start. Inhale 4, hold 7, exhale 8.
breathOrb.reducedMotionHelpText: Breathe at your pace. 4-7-8 technique: 4 seconds in, 7 holding, 8 out.
breathOrb.activeHelpText: Follow the orb's rhythm. If a cycle feels too hard, stop and return to your natural tempo.

perdido.phraseFallback: When there's no direction, start with the body.
perdido.practiceSilenceDesc: Sit. Just observe what appears. Don't correct.
perdido.practiceWriteDesc: Without editing. The next word will come.
perdido.mentorTitle: Give me a path — open Mentor with today's mission

curioso.heading: Where does your curiosity pull?
curioso.subtitle: Tap a pillar to open its layer on your map.

emotion.ansioso: When you're anxious, I can suggest a breathing practice + the code of the day.
emotion.perdido: When you feel lost, I can correlate I Ching with your map to illuminate paths.
emotion.curioso: When you want to explore, I can list the tools I have available.

install.title: Install Sistema Akasha
install.subtitle: Quick access on your phone, works offline

prefs.pageDescription: Choose which types of notifications you want to receive. Changes are saved automatically.
prefs.intro: You can disable any notification type. If you disable a type, notifications of that type won't appear in the bell, but they continue to be generated internally — you can re-enable them at any time.
prefs.lgpdNote: Per LGPD (Art. 18, VI), you have the right to granular consent revocation. Your preferences are stored privately and contain no personal data.
prefs.saveError: Could not save preference. Please try again.

typeDescriptions.diario: Alert when the Daily Mandate is ready for you.
typeDescriptions.mentor: Alert when the Mentor answers an async question.
typeDescriptions.conexoes: High-compatibility match or message from another user.
typeDescriptions.credits: Alert when your balance drops below 5 credits.

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Paginated list of all Akasha users

drawer.title: User details
drawer.warning: Suspending prevents the user from signing in. Use with care.
